Event: Clans Game
Event Date: 30/06/2026
Sage Bot Item Code: AR425
Tech Weaver Outfit

When using a weapon, ring or artifact's ability, the unit increases the spell power, physical and magic armor piercing for self and all allied units by 35% for 5 sec. Stacks up to 5 times.

When using a totem or amulet's ability, the unit increases the fortitude, physical and magic armor for self and all allied units by 35% for 5 sec. Stacks up to 5 times.

Requirements: 98-100

User rating: 🌝🌝🌝🌚🌚
